text:
A young boy named Timmy goes trick-or-traiment every Halloween. Timmy loves all things spooky, especially ghosts. On one hauntingly perfect Halloween night, Timmy hears a ghost whispering secrets about a mysterious lost island.

Curious and excited, Timmy packs his bags with spooky goodies. Every step echoes, seemingly beckoning. He reaches the pier where a ship's ghost floats lazily. The ghost points towards the coast.

A ghostly ship floats offshore into the fog. Timmy paddles across, marveling at the ghost ship. The ghost beckons Timmy closer.

Inside, a treasure chest appears. Everything shimmered golden. Timmy screams, jumping into the sea. The ghost laughs wickedly.

The ghost shows Timmy where to dig. They unearth golden skulls. Happy, Timmy dives into a sea of treasures.

Outside, a dark storm brews. The ghosts disappear. Timmy rows back alone.

He looks back at the ghost ship, golden skull in
